mapper.select: SELECT MEM_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, MEM_NAME, MEM_ROLE, DEL_YN, REP_NAME FROM MEMBER WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( PASSWORD, MEM_NAME, EMAIL, HP_NO, REP_TEL_NO, COMPANY_NAME, REP_NAME, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, CUSTOMS_ID_NO, EMERGENCY_CONTACT, LOGIN_ID, BIZ_REG_NO ) VALUES ( #{password}, #{memName}, #{email}, #{hpNo}, #{repTelNo}, #{companyName}, #{repName}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{customsIdNo}, #{emergencyContact}, #{loginId}, #{bizRegNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MEM_ID = #{memId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.*, NVL(B.WORK_COUNT, 0) AS TASK_LOAD FROM MEMBER A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OFFICER_ID, COUNT(*) AS WORK_COUNT FROM ( SELECT OFFICER_ID, STATUS FROM EXPORT_MASTER UNION ALL SELECT OFFICER_ID, STATUS FROM IMPORT_MASTER ) WHERE STATUS != 'DELIVERED' GROUP BY OFFICER_ID ) B ON A.MEM_ID = B.OFFICER_ID WHERE A.MEM_ROLE = 'OFFICER' ORDER BY TASK_LOAD DESC, A.MEM_NAME ASC
